description_long: This is a large, detached house set on a spacious, landscaped lot with a driveway, garage, and multiple trees and shrubs. The house features a prominent front porch with wooden columns, a gabled roof with dormer windows, and a mix of stone and wood siding. The property includes a paved driveway leading to a garage, a backyard with a round above-ground pool, and a swing set. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some larger windows and a few smaller ones on the upper floor. The roof is primarily a steep gable style, with additional smaller gables and dormers adding architectural interest. The overall design suggests a Craftsman or modern suburban style, with attention to landscaping and outdoor amenities.
description: A large, Craftsman-style house with a gabled roof, front porch, garage, landscaped yard, and backyard amenities including a pool and swing set.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, symmetrical landscaping, driveway, and garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of tall trees, side windows, and the depth of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, above-ground pool, back porch, and swing set.
description_view_3: Side view with driveway, car, and a clear look at the garage and entry path.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some larger and dormer windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with wooden columns, steps, and a prominent main door
